special_mechanics.name: Rage Gauge
special_mechanics.description: A meter that only increases as a player receives damage. When fully activated, it has numerous effects depending on game mechanics.

tier_notes: Tier 2: This is a fighting game port with no specific movement physics documentation available in the provided sources. The TCRF article focuses on anti-piracy features rather than gameplay mechanics. Wikipedia provides series context and game history but no quantified physics parameters.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Samurai Shodown SNES article)
